Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Houska, (415)693-2153 for Plaintiff/Moving party Figure Projects, Inc.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF FIGURE PROJECTS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Plaintiff Figure Projects, Inc'S Motion For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FIGURE PROJECTS, INC'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.

Appearances: Anthony D. Giles of the Law Office of Anthony Giles (415.839.2099) for defendant and responding party; David Houska of Cooley (415.693.2153) for plaintiff and moving party.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Writ of Attachment to secure $259,555.56 in defendant NWBLK, LLC's property is granted. Figures Projects met its burden to show that all the requirements for writ of attachment are satisfied under CCP 483.010 and immediate relief is appropriate under CPP 485.010 because NWBLK is insolvent. NWBLK does not oppose the writ of attachment. NWBLK's request that it be permitted to put $50,000 into its litigation attorney's trust account for its representation in this lawsuit and that this amount shall not be subject to attachment is denied. CCP 486.060(b)(4) only applies when a court grants a temporary protective order, not a writ of attachment. Order signed. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/GLW)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FIGURE PROJECTS, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION's Motion For Writ Of Attachment

This motion will be heard in department 501 at 9:30am on February 15, 2018. That department hears all cases concerning commercial real property leases. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
